brand.name: PuraFlora
brand.tagline: Nature's purity, balance for your flora.

value.title: Nature with purpose, science with care
value.subtitle: We select natural actives and balanced formulas to support your body at every stage — with transparency, purity and respect for your own pace.

items.title: Purity in every formula
items.desc: Naturally sourced actives, nothing in excess. Just what your wellbeing needs, the way nature intended.

items.title: Flora in balance
items.desc: From the gut to immunity: we care for the foundation that supports your energy, mood and vitality.

items.title: Modern naturopathy
items.desc: The wisdom of plants meets today's nutrition in supplements that fit your everyday life.

items.title: Integrative care
items.desc: Beauty, immunity, energy and sleep — a portfolio designed to care for the whole body.

philosophy.title: Caring for your flora is caring for life
philosophy.body: We believe health blossoms from the inside out. Every PuraFlora supplement is born from the union of naturopathic tradition and contemporary nutrition — to nourish your flora, strengthen your immunity and bring balance back to your routine, naturally.

categories.title: A ritual for every need
categories.subtitle: Browse what your body is asking for today.

steps.title: Choose your ritual
steps.desc: Find the ideal supplement for your goal with clear categories and honest descriptions.

steps.title: Delivered with care
steps.desc: We ship across Brazil with safe packaging and free shipping over R$ 199.

steps.title: Feel the balance
steps.desc: Add it to your routine and watch your body flourish, day after day.

items.quote: I added collagen and magnesium to my routine and felt a real difference in my energy within weeks. It's part of my ritual now.
items.author: Marina L.

newsletter.title: Get wellbeing rituals and exclusive offers

beto.title: Beto Munhoz's trust in every product
beto.intro: For years I have dedicated my life to the study of health, beauty, quality of life and naturopathy. In this store you'll find a carefully curated selection of products, chosen with responsibility, quality and commitment. My goal is to offer only products that meet the standards I consider essential to care for people's health and wellbeing.
beto.name: Beto Munhoz
beto.bio: Researcher and communicator in health, quality of life and wellbeing.
beto.positioning: Knowledge that builds trust. Products selected with responsibility.
beto.socialTitle: More than 1 million people follow Beto Munhoz's work
beto.socialSubtitle: Follow free content on health, quality of life, beauty and naturopathy.

seal.title: Beto Munhoz Quality Commitment
seal.intro: Every product offered in this store goes through rigorous selection criteria. Our commitment is to offer products that meet the following principles:
principles: Selection based on technical knowledge and experience
Commitment to transparency and respect for the consumer
seal.quote: My reputation was built over many years. That's why I only recommend products I truly believe in.
seal.author: Beto Munhoz

footer.tagline: Natural supplements to nourish your flora, from the gut to vitality.
footer.disclaimer: Products are dietary supplements, not medicines. They do not replace a balanced diet. Pregnant or nursing women and people under medical care should consult a health professional.

consent.title: Privacy
consent.text: We use cookies and analytics pixels to understand how the store is used and improve your experience. You can accept or decline — these tools only load with your consent.
